title: National Scholarship Portal (NSP)
description: Central platform hosting 650+ scholarships for students from school to university.

title: Central Sector Scheme of Scholarships for College and University Students
description: Merit-based scholarships for undergraduate/postgraduate students via Direct Benefit Transfer.

title: National Means-cum-Merit Scholarship (NMMS)
description: ₹12,000/year for meritorious students from economically weaker sections in classes IX–XII.

title: Post-Matric Scholarship for SC/ST/OBC Students
description: Financial aid for higher education of disadvantaged groups.

title: Top Class Education Scheme for SC Students
description: Covers tuition, living expenses, and books for SC students in top institutions.

title: AICTE Pragati Scholarship
description: Support for girl students pursuing technical education.

title: AICTE Saksham Scholarship
description: Support for differently-abled students in technical education.

title: ISHAN UDAY Special Scholarship Scheme
description: Scholarships for students from the North Eastern Region.

title: National Fellowship and Scholarship for Higher Education of ST Students
description: Financial support for ST students pursuing MPhil/PhD.

title: Maulana Azad National Fellowship
description: Scholarships for minority students pursuing higher education.
